goal: 给 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base 做一个 Web 知识管理系统，仅本地运行，不考虑认证。要求：浏览所有 markdown 文档，支持目录和标签导航，类似维基百科的双向链接跳转，全文搜索，以及简单的文档编辑能力。代码输出到 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base/web/ 目录

tree.description: Fix Flask app to serve static/index.html directly instead of the minimal Jinja2 template, ensuring the full UI loads correctly
Fix all broken frontend JS: wikilink click navigation, search result clicks, tag filter with tree rebuild, backlinks rendering, editor toggle/save/cancel, and hamburger menu toggle

children.description: Fix wikilink click navigation: ensure rendered wiki-links have class='wiki-link' and data-target attribute from backend, and app.js resolves them to loadDoc()
Fix search result clicks: clicking a result loads the doc, clears the input, and hides the dropdown
Fix tag cloud filter: clicking a tag pill fetches /api/tags/<tag>, rebuilds tree with allowed paths, toggles .active class on pill
Fix backlinks panel: render clickable backlink list items in #backlinks-list from doc.backlinks array
Fix editor toggle/save/cancel: fix CSS selector mismatch (#editor-area → #editor-container), ensure Edit button toggles editor visibility, Save POSTs and reloads, Cancel hides editor
Fix hamburger menu: toggle body.sidebar-open class, create overlay element, close sidebar on overlay click

tree.description: Fix CSS issues: tree indentation for nested folders, tag cloud active state, backlinks panel styling, editor container layout, and mobile responsive hamburger overlay

children.description: Ensure tree indentation scales visually per nesting level: verify .tree-children padding-left accumulates correctly and add a left-border visual guide for nested levels
Verify and fix the tag pill active state: ensure .tag-pill.active has a visually distinct background, color, and font-weight compared to the default and hover states
Clean up duplicate/conflicting backlinks selectors (#backlinks-list vs #backlinks vs .backlink-item) and ensure consistent spacing and hover states for backlink items
Ensure #editor-container and #editor-textarea fill the available width of the center column, with proper flex layout so textarea expands vertically
Verify mobile responsive layout: hamburger button visible below 768px, sidebar slides in as fixed overlay with backdrop, center content gets top padding to avoid hamburger overlap

tree.description: Fix backend API endpoints: ensure /api/search returns correct format with snippets, /api/doc POST saves content and rebuilds index, /api/tags/<name> returns filtered doc list, and wikilink HTML output uses correct CSS class and data attributes for JS click handling

children.description: Verify and fix /api/search to return {path, title, snippet, tags} for each result, ensuring snippet extraction handles edge cases (no match in body, match at start/end of file)

Verify and fix POST /api/doc to accept {path, content}, write file to disk, rebuild the index, and return {success: true, path}. Ensure path traversal check works on Windows (resolve() + startswith comparison with consistent separators)
Verify and fix GET /api/tags/<tag_name> to return a JSON array of document path strings that have the given tag, compatible with frontend Set() construction for tree filtering
Verify and fix wikilink HTML rendering in render_markdown() to output display, ensuring the CSS class and data attribute match what app.js queries (a.wiki-link selector and dataset.target)

tree.description: Start the server, manually verify all features work end-to-end: tree navigation, doc loading, wikilinks, search, tags, backlinks, editor save, then commit and push
